recap: Rewrote colors.conf with 20-family decade-aligned palette (slots 20-239), updated slots 8-15 to secondary family canonicals, updated colors-build test fixture to match new slot layout.
Updated color-documentation.html: slot 1 hex to #e53e3e, ALT_COLORED to include slots 8-15, NEUTRAL_TERMINAL reduced to slots 0 and 7, all French JS comments translated to English.
